attempts.result: Audit closeout supersedes the initial 58/58 shell record: Debug and Release native tests each passed 233/233 (191 core route/package-manager checks plus 42 parser checks), including 25 focused Binary Text cases; the linked managed-reference regression passed 18/18; and process-owned UI Automation passed 68/68 after exercising explicit Copy and selected-base/input/output retention. Added regression vectors cover managed Unicode trimming and grouped versus isolated malformed UTF-8 replacement boundaries. A fresh native driver capture remained blocked exactly because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank or near-uniform WinUI client frame; no image was substituted.

routes.notes: 2026-07-13 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中 solely because fresh visual capture is blocked. A genuine standard-C++ core reproduces the managed UTF-8 byte-code converter: padded binary, decimal, octal, uppercase two-digit hexadecimal, space/tab/CR/LF/comma separators, matching 0b/0o/0x prefixes, and atomic malformed/range failure with no partial decode output. It mirrors managed replacement-character behavior for malformed UTF-8 and unpaired UTF-16, including malformed continuation, truncated, overlong, surrogate, and out-of-range scalar sequences. The native C++/WinRT page preserves base/input/output across English, Cantonese, and bilingual rerenders; has localized UI Automation names and a polite live region; and is reachable as binarytext, textbinary, and module.binarytext. Clipboard access is explicit Copy-only; the conversion core has no process, network, file, registry, elevation, persistence, or secret path. Debug and Release native builds completed with 0 errors; each native test executable passed 233/233 (191 core route/package-manager checks plus 42 parser checks), including 25 focused Binary Text cases; the linked managed-reference oracle passed 18/18; the managed solution completed with 0 errors; catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, five dynamic families, 319 records, and 22 categories; and the process-owned elevated UI Automation shell passed 58/58, driving binary/hex conversion, output move, malformed-output clear, localization retention, accessibility, and every alias. The required fresh driver capture for binarytext failed exactly because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank or near-uniform WinUI client frame; no blank, stale, synthetic, or managed screenshot was substituted. · 原生標準 C++ core 跟受控 UTF-8 位元組轉換器：補足二進位、十進位、八進位、大楷兩位十六進位、空格／tab／CR/LF／逗號分隔、配對 0b/0o/0x prefix，同原子式格式錯誤／範圍失敗，唔會有部分解碼輸出；無效 continuation、截斷、overlong、surrogate、超範圍 scalar 同未配對 UTF-16 都會跟受控版用替代字元。C++/WinRT 頁會喺英文、粵語、雙語之間保留進位／輸入／輸出，有本地化 UI Automation 名稱同 polite live region；`binarytext`、`textbinary`、`module.binarytext` 都會開真正功能。剪貼簿只限明確 Copy；轉換 core 冇 process、網絡、檔案、registry、提升權限、持久化或者 secret 路徑。Debug／Release 233/233（191 core + 42 parser）、受控基準 18/18、受控 solution 0 errors、目錄對等同 UI Automation 58/58 全部通過。因為最新 driver 截圖仍然受桌面擷取阻擋，冇用空白、舊、合成或者受控版截圖頂替，所以 route 如實保持進行中。

attempts.result: Shared native regression was extended with Text to Binary: Debug and Release each passed 233/233 (191 core route/package-manager checks plus 42 parser checks), while the original 48 focused Check Digit assertions and the process-owned 68/68 UI Automation coverage remain green.

routes.notes: 2026-07-13 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中 solely because visual capture is blocked. The genuine standard-C++ implementation covers Luhn with Visa/Amex/Mastercard/Discover detection, ISBN-10 including X, ISBN-13, EAN-13, UPC-A, and bounded incremental mod-97 IBAN validation. Native and managed-oracle standards now agree on ASCII digits, ISBN-13 prefixes 978/979, and SWIFT IBAN Registry Release 102: 89 registered prefixes, numeric check digits, exact country length, and BBAN character classes are checked before mod-97. An independent pinned 89-row Release 102 fixture is compared exactly in both suites, and Unicode letters that case-fold to ASCII are rejected. Discover labelling follows the official 16–19-digit 60110000–60119999 and 64400000–65899999 ranges and excludes adjacent 6590/UnionPay space. The page distinguishes malformed, valid, and invalid states; reports expected checks; preserves scheme/input/result across English, Cantonese, and bilingual rerenders; gives controls localized accessible names; clears stale accessible detail; raises polite live-region events; and uses no CLR, network, file, registry, process, elevation, persistence, clipboard, or secret side effect. Debug and Release x64 native builds completed with 0 errors; the legacy managed solution compile check also completed with 0 errors after its SDK item glob explicitly excluded the ignored NuGet restore tree and the native source/generated tree; each native aggregate passed 208/208 (48 focused Check Digit cases); the managed-oracle mirror passed 24/24; the process-owned elevated shell passed 46/46, exercising all six schemes, accessibility cleanup, and all aliases; catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, five dynamic families, 319 records, and 22 categories; source audit resolved 2,858/2,858 handlers with zero actionable markers; and the Release PE has a zero COM descriptor with no coreclr, hostfxr, or mscoree import. The required fresh driver capture was retried after standards/accessibility hardening and failed exactly because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank or near-uniform WinUI client frame; no stale, blank, synthetic, or managed screenshot was substituted. · 原生同受控基準已同步 ASCII 數字、ISBN-13 978／979，同 SWIFT Release 102 全部 89 個 IBAN prefix／固定長度／BBAN 類別；兩個套件都會同獨立固定 89 行 Release 102 fixture 精確比較，亦拒絕會 case-fold 做 ASCII 嘅 Unicode 字母；Discover 標籤跟官方 16–19 位 60110000–60119999 同 64400000–65899999 ranges，並排除相鄰 6590／UnionPay 空間；舊受控 solution 亦喺 SDK item glob 排除 NuGet restore 同原生 source／generated tree 後以 0 errors 建置；另有本地化無障礙名稱、清除舊 detail 同 polite live-region event。Debug／Release 208/208、受控基準 24/24、UI Automation 46/46、目錄／來源／PE 審查全部通過。加固後再次嘗試新截圖仍因桌面擷取受阻，所以 route 如實保持進行中，冇用舊圖、空白圖、合成圖或受控版圖片頂替。

attempts.result: Native GUID & ID Generator parity slice implemented: standard-C++ core generates RFC 4122 v4 GUIDs in D/N/B/P/X formats with uppercase and 1-1000 bulk output, creates ULIDs and nano-IDs, and inspects GUID byte order/version/variant. Debug and Release native tests each passed 281/281 (235 core route/package-manager checks plus 46 parser checks), including 16 focused GUID tests. The process-owned UI Automation smoke passed 115/115 after driving guidgen and module.guidgen, format switching, uppercase output, default bulk generation, ULID, nano-ID, inspector valid/invalid states, and language rerender preservation. LowLevel cheap headless launch from C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\GitHub\lowlevel-computer-use-mcp created a Windows headless desktop, launched WinForge.exe --page guidgen, listed the headless WinUI window, and captured its HWND, but the screenshot was a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. The repository driver attempt also failed because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. No blank/stale/synthetic/managed image was retained.

routes.notes: 2026-07-14 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中 solely because fresh visual capture is blocked. `module.guidgen` and `guidgen` now open a real native C++/WinRT page backed by standard-C++ logic for RFC 4122 v4 GUID generation, D/N/B/P/X formatting, uppercase output, 1-1000 bulk generation, ULID, nano-ID, and GUID byte/version/variant inspection. The page preserves generated and inspected values through English/Cantonese/Bilingual rerenders, exposes stable UI Automation IDs, and touches the clipboard only after explicit Copy actions. Debug/Release native builds completed with 0 errors and 0 warnings. Debug and Release tests passed 281/281, including 16 GUID cases, and process-owned UI Automation passed 115/115. LowLevel headless desktop launch was attempted through the local cheap runner and proved launch/list-window behavior, but both LowLevel HWND capture and the repo driver produced blank/near-uniform WinUI client frames, so no screenshot is accepted as native visual proof. · 呢條 route 只係因為最新視覺擷取受阻而保持進行中。`module.guidgen` 同 `guidgen` 而家會開真正 C++/WinRT 原生頁，以標準 C++ 實作 RFC 4122 v4 GUID、D/N/B/P/X 格式、大楷輸出、1-1000 個批量產生、ULID、nano-ID，同 GUID byte／version／variant 檢查。頁面轉英文／粵語／雙語時保留已產生同已檢查值，有穩定 UI Automation ID，而且只會喺明確 Copy 後先寫剪貼簿。Debug／Release 建置係 0 errors、0 warnings；測試 281/281、GUID 專項 16 個、UI Automation 115/115 全部通過。LowLevel 無頭 desktop 已用本機 cheap runner 嘗試並證明 launch／列 window，但 LowLevel HWND 擷取同 repo driver 都只得到空白／接近單色 WinUI client frame，所以冇截圖會被當成原生視覺證據。

attempts.result: Package Manager now parses safe common Details fields from CLI key/value output and JSON above the bounded raw output while dropping secret-like, duplicate, and unknown fields. Debug and Release each passed 265/265 (219 core route/package-manager checks plus 46 parser checks), retaining Package Manager command, parser, runtime, containment, alias, bundle, sort, state, Details-query, update-rule, and snooze assertions; the process-owned UI Automation shell passed 97/97 with native update-rule and custom snooze-duration picker coverage. Native driver capture remained blocked because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. LowLevel MCP checkout exists locally, but no LowLevel MCP tools are exposed in this Codex session and the local fallback lacks uv/python/mcp dependencies.

Package Manager Operations now persists probe/query events and preview-only install/update/uninstall plans as structured queue entries, imports legacy string history, and exposes run-next/run-last ordering plus retry-preview markers. No package-manager mutation process is executed. Debug and Release native tests remain expected at 265/265, and the process-owned UI Automation shell now covers the preview queue policy and controls at 101/101. Native driver capture for package-operations remained blocked because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. LowLevel MCP checkout exists locally, but no LowLevel MCP tools are exposed in this Codex session and the local fallback lacks uv/python/mcp dependencies.

routes.notes: 2026-07-14 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中. Native C++ exposes nine views and 11 Windows manager adapters. Discover, Updates, and Installed have non-mutating result queries; Details runs a bounded read-only per-row query through the validated details command and renders safe parsed common fields above raw bounded command output; local all-version ignores, update-version pins, and configurable 1/7/14/30-day snoozes persist in native JSON, list/remove in Ignored, and hide matching Updates rows; Bundles has a native snapshot import/export preview; Sources is a read-only command probe that deliberately withholds all raw configuration and diagnostics until manager-specific secret redaction is proven. Per-row Install, Update, Uninstall, and Update All remain preview-only executable/argv plans in Operations through the same validated command builders; those plans now persist as structured queue entries, import legacy string history, expose run-next/run-last ordering and retry-preview markers, and still execute no package mutation process. Argument-vector handling, executable/PATH resolution, HTTP and captured-output bounds, process-token verification, explicit state, fail-closed integrity checks, and accessibility/UI Automation contracts are hardened. Earlier Package Manager evidence passed Debug/Release 265/265 and elevated shell 101/101; the later GUID Generator slice raised the current whole native executable to 281/281 and shell smoke to 115/115 without removing Package Manager coverage. Normal-integrity live external-query evidence is blocked because even an interactive RunLevel=Limited task launched elevated (`candidate smoke token is still elevated`), so the verifier failed closed before querying. LowLevel MCP checkout exists at C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\GitHub\lowlevel-computer-use-mcp; the callable MCP namespace is not exposed in this Codex session, but the repo-local cheap runner is available and later proved headless desktop launch/list-window behavior for guidgen. Visual evidence remains capture-blocked: CopyFromScreen is unavailable and PrintWindow returned a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. Manager-specific rich Details layouts/actions, scheduler/notification integration, real mutation execution/output/cancellation/consent coordination, Setup, broader Settings, .NET update resolution, PyPI hydration, and manager-specific source redaction/presentation remain incomplete. The complete 1,002-file Devolutions/UniGetUI main snapshot at 21116375c8299d1db38a3c3b4c2eb7e18bc97c4e (2026-07-10, MIT) is provenance/reference only, excluded from runtime, and not parity evidence. · 原生 C++ 已有九個 view、11 個 Windows manager adapter，Discover／Updates／Installed 非修改結果查詢、Details 有界只讀逐列查詢並顯示安全已解析常用欄位，本機全部版本忽略、更新版本釘選同可設定 1／7／14／30 日暫停會保存、列出／移除並隱藏相符 Updates 資料列，Bundle 快照匯入／匯出預覽、隱藏原始輸出嘅 Sources 指令探測；安裝／更新／解除安裝仍然只供預覽，而預覽計劃會保存成結構化佇列、匯入舊歷史、支援下一個／最後執行排序同重試預覽標記但唔會執行修改；較早套件管理證據係 Debug／Release 265/265 同提權 UI 101/101，較後 GUID 批次將目前整體原生 executable 提升到 281/281、shell smoke 提升到 115/115，而冇移除套件管理覆蓋；正常 integrity 外部查詢、視覺證據同逐管理器來源遮罩仍受阻。LowLevel checkout 存在，本 session 冇 callable MCP namespace，但本機 cheap runner 可用並已喺 GUID 批次證明無頭 desktop launch／列 window 行為。逐管理器豐富 Details 版面／動作、排程／通知整合、真正修改執行／輸出／取消／同意協調及其餘完整流程未完成。UniGetUI snapshot 只係來源／參考，唔代表對等。

attempts.result: Shared native regression was extended with Text to Binary: Debug and Release each passed 233/233 (191 core route/package-manager checks plus 42 parser checks), retaining all three Package Manager selected-view alias assertions; the process-owned UI Automation shell passed 68/68.

dynamicRoutes.notes: 2026-07-13 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中. The native shell resolves package-discover, package-updates, and package-installed to the exact Discover, Updates, and Installed views; plural compatibility aliases are covered in the core suite. The expanded Debug and Release regression aggregates each pass 208/208 and retain every package alias assertion; the elevated process-owned UI Automation shell passes 46/46 and retains end-to-end deterministic selection for all three singular aliases plus fail-closed elevation behavior. Added checks belong to Check Digit and do not replace Package Manager evidence. Normal-integrity live external-query evidence remains blocked because Windows returned an elevated token for an interactive RunLevel=Limited task (`candidate smoke token is still elevated`), so no live-query pass is claimed. Fresh native visual evidence remains capture-blocked because CopyFromScreen is unavailable and PrintWindow returned a blank/near-uniform WinUI frame. Query results are read-only; install, update, uninstall, bulk actions, and operation coordination remain gated. · 三條套件 deep link 已準確開到 Discover／Updates／Installed；擴充後 Debug／Release 208/208 同提權 UI 46/46 通過，原有套件 alias 證據全部保留，新增檢查只屬檢查碼；但正常 integrity 外部查詢同視覺證據仍受阻，所有修改操作仍然鎖住。
